subject: A Spellkeeper Weird — an elemental construct of crackling blue-white ice or water energy, striding through a battle-damaged urban setting with gothic spires, fire at its feet
description: A tall humanoid figure composed entirely of crackling blue-white elemental energy — jagged crystalline or ice-like in texture — strides forward in a wide stance. Its body has no clothing or organic features; it is purely constructed of sharp angular bursts of luminous blue-white material. The head is elongated and spiky upward. One arm extends forward and the other is raised behind, giving a sense of powerful mid-stride motion. Behind and below the creature, orange and red fire burns in the lower right corner. The background shows a daylit urban skyline with dark gothic stone spires and towers, partially obscured by bright sky and scattered debris. The overall palette contrasts the vivid blue of the elemental against warm orange fire and pale sky.
foreground: blue-white elemental construct striding forward, fire at lower right
background: gothic urban spires, pale sky, scattered debris
emotion: purposeful, aggressive stride — no readable face
